title: Illinois Tool (ITW) Exhibits Strong Prospects, Endures Risks
text: Illinois Tool (ITW) is poised to benefit from its exposure in the diverse end markets, acquired assets and shareholder-friendly policies. However, supply-chain bottlenecks remain a concern.

title: Sanctuary Wealth CIO: these two ‘boring' stocks are now a ‘buy'
text: U.S. equities remained volatile on Friday, closing down 4.0% from the weekly high. Amidst the turmoil, the Sanctuary Wealth CIO says the following two “boring” stocks now look like exciting buys.

title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Illinois Tool's (ITW) Q1 earnings results reflect strength in almost all its business segments. Management lifts revenue view for 2022.

title: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) CEO Scott Santi on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE:ITW ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 3, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Karen Fletcher - Vice President of Investor Relations Scott Santi - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Michael Larsen - Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Scott Davis - Melius Research Tami Zakaria - JPMorgan Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Andy Kaplowitz - Citigroup Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Mig Dobre - Baird Julian Mitchell - Barclays Operator Good morning. My name is David, and I'll be your conference operator today.

title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.93% and 4.56%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: ITW Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., May 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) today reported its first quarter 2022 results.

title: Should You Buy Illinois Tool (ITW) Ahead of Earnings?
text: Illinois Tool (ITW) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
